title: The Road to Elbaf Opens
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Zoro, Luffy, Vegapunk as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 'You're awake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Phew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thank goodness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you all right, lilith?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lilith- chaaaan!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh right, we're on the giants' ship. No wonder everything's so massive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will be a bitter pill to swallow, but we have to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We weren't able to save any of the other vegapunks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please forgive us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Atlas hit you pretty hard... so it's understandable if you're disoriented.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am so sorry to see. I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay. I've already heard about what happened!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: heard? From whom?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just need to cry for a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WARAAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How are you the EVIL one again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Put 02

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, I'm hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You got over it fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, if you're hungry, the giants left us a lot of fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be because I'm no longer connected to york...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say... the atmosphere from that table seems a bit gloomy, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DAM IT ALL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WE PROMISED TO SAVE APPLE- GRAMPS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy's been beating himself up over what happened. He's so down he's only had five bunches of grapes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's plenty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, so Luffy's been taking it badly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's alright though, I just heard about it and I'm sure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean you "heard about it"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A second ago, I was crying because I was sad about everyone's deaths.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: However, it's all a matter of perspective.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Here's the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to put it simply...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Everyone's alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even if they're functionality dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I don't get it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So they're... G-Ghosts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Basically what I'm trying to say...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Is that you kept your promise to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So don't be so glum, Luffy!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
